hero.title: Hotel Prayagraj
hero.subtitle: A premium sanctuary blending modern comfort with traditional Rajasthani warmth.

about.text: Located near the holy Khatu Shyam Ji Temple.

settings.address: 2–3 Shree Shyam Vihar Colony, Reengus, Rajasthan 332404

messages.text: Namaste! Welcome to Hotel Prayagraj. How can I assist you today?

Namaste! A very warm welcome to you. How are you doing today? 

Whether you need assistance with your room, recommendations for local sightseeing in the holy city of Prayagraj, travel arrangements, or dining suggestions, I am here to ensure you have a comfortable and memorable stay.

How may I assist you this morning?
